nasb.text: Take away the wicked before the king, And his throne will be established in righteousness.

esv.text: take away the wicked from the presence of the king, and his throne will be established in righteousness.

cnv.text: 除去君王面前的壞人， 他的王位就可以靠公義堅立。

ccb.text: 清除君王身边的恶人， 王位必因公义而巩固。

csbs.text: 除掉王面前的恶人， 王的宝座就藉着公义而坚立。
